post.description: Find and return notifications sorted by date descending for the logged user and the given criteria filters.

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

200.description: The notifications were successfully retrieved. Returns a paged list of NotificationLight.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

post.summary: Retrieve the list of notifications for the logged user.

post.description: Create and save a new notification in database for later sending by a scheduler.

201.description: The notification was successfully created. Returns the created Notification.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

delete.description: Find and delete notifications from criteria defined in request body.

204.description: The notification deletion has been taken into account.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

422.description: The notification criteria dto syntax is incorrect.

get.description: Find and return the notification configuration parameters for the currently logged user.

200.description: The notification settings were successfully retrieved. Returns the NotificationSettings.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

404.description: No notification settings found for the current user.

get.summary: Retrieve notification settings for the logged user.

put.description: Update the notification configuration parameters for the currently logged user.

200.description: The notification settings were successfully updated. Returns the updated NotificationSettings.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

404.description: No notification settings found for the current user.

put.summary: Update notification settings for the logged user.

get.description: Retrieve a summary with the count of read and unread notifications for the logged user.

200.description: The notifications summary was successfully retrieved. Returns a NotificationSummary.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

delete.description: Find and delete a single notification by its identifier.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

404.description: No notification found with the given id.

get.description: Find and return a single notification by its identifier.

200.description: The notification was successfully retrieved. Returns the Notification.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

404.description: No notification found with the given id.

put.description: Update the status of the notification with the given identifier to READ.

200.description: The notification status was successfully updated to READ. Returns the updated Notification.

403.description: The endpoint is not accessible for the user.

404.description: No notification found with the given id.

post.description: Return a page of users of the project matching according criterias.

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

200.description: All users of the project were retrieved.
